calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-22-2009 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-22-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Plaintiff appeared in propria persona. Adam Lazar, Esq., appeared for defendant Abel Lopez, who is also present.

Settlement Conference Held. Stipulation for Entry of Judgment or Dismissal of Action (Pay and Stay) for property located at 1751 market Street, #8, (first bedroom to right) San Francisco, California, filed. See scanned Document. Trial date vacated.

Judge Pro Tem Jason Jungreis, Clerk Garth Sayers, Not Reported

Notice Of Motion To Quash Service Of Summons
Off Calendar Mar-13-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT ABEL LOPEZ'S Motion to Quash Service of Summons. Appearances: Michael Skahill, (415) 756-8004, Plaintiff in Pro Per appearing, and opposing party; Abel Lopez, aka, Logan Lopez, (415) 225-3270, Defendant in Pro Per appearing, and moving party. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion denied. Defendant was personally served. (The Court bases this on the Proof of Service filed by the process server and evidence presented by Plaintiff.) Parties waive notice. Defendant has five days from today to file response pleading. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Beldon Yee, CSR 2647

Notice Of Motion To Quash Service Of Summons
Off Calendar Mar-10-2009 Continued To Mar-13-09 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT ABEL LOPEZ'S Motion to Quash Service Of Summons. Appearances: Michael Skahill, Plaintiff in Pro Per appearing, and opposing party; Abel Lopez, Defendant in Pro Per appearing and moving party. Argued and the Court vacates its tentative ruling and continues the matter to March 13, 2009. Plaintiff to file opposition and leave courtesy copy for the Court. (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5759
